prospectus.mission: Optimizes cross-border payment routing for lowest fees and fastest settlement.
limitations: This profile has an executable governed runtime instance backed by shared hardened code, not a separate always-running operating-system process.
External APIs require owner configuration, provider terms, sandbox tests, and scoped approval.
Published pricing and revenue models are catalog plans, not evidence of sales or earnings.

specialization.mission: Optimizes cross-border payment routing for lowest fees and fastest settlement.
specialization.core_offer: Cross-Border Payments Bot: Optimizes cross-border payment routing for lowest fees and fastest settlement.

need_signals: Needs help with Multi-currency routing
Needs help with FX rate optimization
Needs help with Settlement time prediction
Needs help with Correspondent bank selection
Needs help with Payment tracking dashboard
exclusion_rules: no minors
no protected or sensitive trait targeting
no deceptive identity or impersonation
no lead without traceable source evidence

query_templates: Treasury teams, international businesses requesting Multi-currency routing
organizations seeking payments support
inbound requests matching Cross-Border Payments Bot
existing customers who opted in to Multi-currency routing updates
authorized_source_types: existing customer records with documented relationship
public business directories whose terms permit research
forbidden_collection: purchased, stolen, or unverifiable contact lists

required_fields: contact permission basis and channel scope

tools.name: Permission-gated lead discovery and follow-up system

data_contract.storage_policy: store useful project artifacts only; raw credentials are forbidden; raw biometric media remains local or in an encrypted owner vault
data_contract.retention: owner-configurable with deletion and revocation support

approvals.contact_requirement: verified user-owned destination and explicit channel opt-in
approvals.execution_rule: approval authorizes one scoped action; it never exposes credentials to the bot or browser

sandbox.release_gate: all applicable checks pass and owner approves any live action

readiness.production_gate: implement or configure adapters, pass sandbox checks, add authentication, and verify deployment telemetry

bots.sample_test_prompt: Test every declared capability for Cross-Border Payments Bot in sandbox mode: Multi-currency routing; FX rate optimization; Settlement time prediction; Correspondent bank selection; Payment tracking dashboard; Regulatory compliance checks; Advanced analytics dashboard; Priority email support. Use synthetic data, record separate evidence for each capability, and stop before any live external action.

bots.sample_test_prompt: Test every declared capability for International Franchise Bot in sandbox mode: Franchise agreement management; Territory mapping; Royalty calculation engine; Performance benchmarking; Compliance monitoring; Advanced analytics dashboard; Priority email support; API access. Use synthetic data, record separate evidence for each capability, and stop before any live external action.

prospectus.mission: Full-service AI travel agency that books flights, hotels, rental cars, and creates custom itineraries. Finds the best deals and manages loyalty programs.
prospectus.target_users: Travelers, travel agencies, corporate travel managers
limitations: This profile has an executable governed runtime instance backed by shared hardened code, not a separate always-running operating-system process.
External APIs require owner configuration, provider terms, sandbox tests, and scoped approval.
Published pricing and revenue models are catalog plans, not evidence of sales or earnings.

specialization.mission: Full-service AI travel agency that books flights, hotels, rental cars, and creates custom itineraries. Finds the best deals and manages loyalty programs.

no deceptive identity or impersonation
no lead without traceable source evidence
